papers.title: Whole-Body Impedance Model Predictive Control for Safe Physical Human--Robot Interaction on Floating-Base Platforms
WT-UMI: Tactile-based Whole-Body Manipulation via Force-Supervised Contact-Aware Planning
papers.summary: WT-UMI是一种可穿戴全身触觉接口，通过力监督规划实现人形机器人的全身操作，能够在人体演示和远程操作两种模式下获取触觉图像、接触力和末端姿态数据。

papers.title: Proprioceptive-visual correspondence enables self-other distinction in humanoid robots
papers.summary: 本文提出通过本体感-视觉Correspondence无需身份标签或运动模型即可让人形机器人学会自我-他者区分，并基于此构建从关节配置到三维肌体占据的预测自我模型。

papers.title: GenHOI: Contact-Aware Humanoid-Object Interaction by Imitating Generated Videos without Task-Specific Training
papers.summary: GenHOI提出通过生成视频引导人形机器人实现zero-shot物体交互的新范式，无需任务特定训练即可完成多样化的接触式操作任务。

companyNews.title: Tesla faces new robotics rival as Optimus production nears - MSN
companyNews.summary: 特斯拉Optimus人形机器人即将投产，面临新竞争对手入场，行业竞争加剧将加速技术迭代与成本下降。

companyNews.title: Will AI-powered humanoid robots someday work alongside us? | 60 Minutes - CBS News
companyNews.summary: CBS报道Boston Dynamics探讨AI驱动的人形机器人未来与人类协同工作的可能性，反映行业正从

companyNews.title: Atlas moves closer to real-world autonomy, KB says - The Korea Herald
companyNews.summary: Atlas在真实世界自主性方面取得进展，朝实际应用更近一步，表明人形机器人技术正向商业化落地迈进。

companyNews.title: Boston Dynamics' humanoid robot Atlas has started "working" and can do more than just backflips. - PANews
companyNews.summary: Atlas开始从事实际工作，不再局限于后空翻等表演动作，标志人形机器人从技术展示向商业应用迈出关键一步。

companyNews.title: Robotics Summit panel explores the state of humanoid robot design - The Robot Report
